text: Go ahead and post it. I'm curious to see what kind of response you'll get.
translation: 发吧，我很好奇你会得到什么样的回复。
rawContent: Go ahead and post it. I'm curious to see what kind of response you'll get. || 发吧，我很好奇你会得到什么样的回复。

text: This expression, however, is quite honest.
rawContent: This expression, however, is quite honest. || 这个表情倒是很诚实。
Blushing? || 脸红了？
Why should I behave? || 我为什么要自重？
I'm being quite sincere. || 我很坦诚。

text: Don't you want me to be honest about what I'm thinking?
translation: 难道你不希望我坦率说出我的想法？
rawContent: Don't you want me to be honest about what I'm thinking? || 难道你不希望我坦率说出我的想法？

replyTo.text: Don't you want me to be honest about what I'm thinking?

text: 表情包：炸毛 脸红 破防

rawContent: Okay, okay. || 好好好。
A boring idiot it is. || 是无聊的笨蛋。

text: So, this 'boring idiot'... can he continue to listen to your honest thoughts?
translation: 那，这个“无聊的笨蛋”…可以继续听你的真心话吗？
rawContent: So, this 'boring idiot'... can he continue to listen to your honest thoughts? || 那，这个“无聊的笨蛋”…可以继续听你的真心话吗？

text: 啊不！你难道没有自己的事要忙吗
表情包：傲娇 雄赳赳气昂昂

replyTo.text: 啊不！你难道没有自己的事要忙吗

rawContent: I do. || 有。

text: But chatting with you is my current priority.
translation: 但和你聊天是我目前需要优先处理的事。
rawContent: But chatting with you is my current priority. || 但和你聊天是我目前需要优先处理的事。

text: This little guy looks quite fierce.
translation: 这个小家伙看起来倒是很凶。
rawContent: This little guy looks quite fierce. || 这个小家伙看起来倒是很凶。
Trying to scare me off? || 想吓跑我？

text: 你被我凶你不会感到疲惫吗.....
吃什么？食堂？还是外卖？我给你点？

replyTo.text: Going to get something to eat.

rawContent: Tired? || 疲惫？

text: Why would I be tired? Observing interesting phenomena is a form of mental recreation for me.
translation: 为什么会疲惫？观察有趣的现象对我来说是种精神调剂。
rawContent: Why would I be tired? Observing interesting phenomena is a form of mental recreation for me. || 为什么会疲惫？观察有趣的现象对我来说是种精神调剂。

text: This cat looks like it's secretly observing something.
translation: 这只猫倒像是在偷偷观察什么。
rawContent: This cat looks like it's secretly observing something. || 这只猫倒像是在偷偷观察什么。

text: Not ordering out. I'll just make something myself.
translation: 不点外卖。自己随便做点。
rawContent: Not ordering out. I'll just make something myself. || 不点外卖。自己随便做点。

text: Don't you have a law exam to prepare for?
rawContent: Don't you have a law exam to prepare for? || 你不是要准备法考？

rawContent: Okay. || 嗯。
